message:
test(connector-sdk): add property-based tests for SDK builders, linting, and certification

25 proptest suites covering:
- ManifestBuilder: valid inputs succeed, missing version/empty id fail, digest determinism,
  display_name default, precomputed digest passthrough
- TrustPolicyBuilder: trust level preservation, capability preservation, strict invariants
- Serde roundtrips: LintFinding, LintReport, SimulationEvent, CertificationReport
- Linter: idempotency, count consistency, passed() invariant, history bounded
- CertificationPipeline: determinism, history bounded
- SHA-256: determinism, 64-char hex output, collision resistance
- ConnectorSimulator: clock monotonicity, registration count tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
